title: Carry It Across
prompt: A dragon guards the hatch. Complete its proof to earn the key.
lore: The deeper you go, the fainter her voice becomes, and the louder the doubt.
help: This room holds 3 lemmas — finish them all (turn every wip into qed). (1) Helper (modus ponens). implication_elim(A, B) cases; by f; and by x;. (2) Helper. forall_elim(T, λx. P(x) ⇒ Q(x), a) then ⊢ ∀y. P(y) ⇒ Q(y); by f;. (3) Uses both. exists_elim; in the witness branch by exists_intro(T, Q, x) then ⊢ Q(x); by mp(P(x), Q(x), at_imp(P, Q, f, x), witness);.
